meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Scaling Freelance SaaS Development
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade SaaS faster. Expert guide for advanced freelancers.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting cycles on boilerplate. The Antigravity project template provides a production-hardened architecture, enabling you to bypass manual setup. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate complex feature implementation, allowing you to ship high-conversion SaaS products for clients in days rather than weeks, ensuring both speed and professional scalability.
content.intro:
You’ve been here: staring at a blank IDE, manually scaffolding authentication, database schemas, and API routes for the hundredth time. The client clock is ticking, and your 'basic app' is already drowning in technical debt before the first deploy. It’s a cycle of mediocrity that keeps you stuck in the junior-tier grind.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This isn't just another starter kit; it’s a high-velocity framework designed to strip away the noise. By synthesizing this architecture with Claude Code, you aren't just coding—you're orchestrating a machine that turns high-level requirements into production-ready features, freeing you to focus on high-value logic instead of configuration hell.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture. This ensures your project starts with pre-configured observability, security middleware, and CI/CD pipelines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise-grade SaaS project using the Antigravity core template with Next.js 15, PostgreSQL (via Prisma), and Auth.js integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map business requirements into robust database schemas, ensuring type safety across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for Organizations, Users, and Subscriptions.

steps.title: Implement Business Logic Layers
steps.description: Decouple your logic from the UI using Antigravity's service-layer pattern, making your code easier to maintain and test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for subscription management that handles Stripe webhook events and updates the organization's plan status.

steps.title: Configure API Security Middleware
steps.description: Automate security hardening to prevent common vulnerabilities before they reach production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement middleware for role-based access control (RBAC) that restricts API access based on user subscription tiers.

steps.title: Automate Frontend Component Generation
steps.description: Generate UI components based on the established backend types to ensure perfect sync between data and view.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD dashboard for managing organizational users using the previously defined Prisma schema.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with Claude Code when modifying core middleware to catch potential circular dependencies.
Map your Antigravity service layer to specific API routes to ensure your client's business logic is never exposed in the frontend bundle.
Utilize Antigravity's built-in telemetry tags to monitor feature usage—clients pay a premium for data-backed product insights.
Keep your database migrations small; use Claude Code to squash migrations only after a successful staging deployment.
Standardize your component naming convention across all client projects to make cross-project feature porting instantaneous.
content.next_steps: After completing this, audit your deployment pipeline to ensure your Antigravity build artifacts are optimized for edge performance.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to outpace every other freelancer in your niche. Stop building from scratch and start scaling your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
